title: Vir Biotechnology (VIR) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Vir Biotechnology has a consensus rating of Strong Buy which is based on 8 buy ratings, 0 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The average price target is $20.86 with a high forecast of $30.00 and a low forecast of $17.00. The average price target represents a 130.24% change from the last price of $9.06. Five analysts covering Vir Biotechnology are now predicting revenues of US$249.4m in 2026. If met, this would reflect a sizeable 281% improvement in revenue compared to the last 12 months. The loss per share is expected to greatly reduce in the near future, narrowing 45% to US$1.45. On average, analysts forecast that VIR's EPS will be -$3.52 for 2025, with the lowest EPS forecast at -$3.58, and the highest EPS forecast at -$3.17. On average, analysts forecast that VIR's EPS will be -$2.96 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at -$3.56, and the highest EPS forecast at -$2.42. Vir Biotechnology's earnings are forecast to decline at 1.8% per annum while its annual revenue is expected to grow at 43.2% per year.
